Event:313630288.title: Startup Coffee Uppsala
Event:313630288.description:
Join for coffee together with other people interested in startups!

Wether you are an entrepreneur, student or just generally interested in tech feel free to join and share your perspectives about startups.

A great opportunity to learn more about the startups in Uppsala.

This event is at a public coffee place. Look around and you will find us! :-)

Event:313358481.title: Friday afterwork at O'Neill's Irish pub
Event:313358481.description:
We only reserve a table if 10 or more people sign up by 18:00 on Thursday evening. If less than 10 have signed up, a table will not be reserved by the organizers and someone will need to reserve a table or plan an alternative location. Please check back before going to the Pub Friday.

If you plan to attend you must RSVP by 19:00 on Thursday when the table is reserved. No more RSVPs will be accepted after that time.

Use the comments to comunicate since Jacaranda does not respond to private messages.

We place our orders at the bar and please keep in mind that the pub is a business and since they are making space for us on their busiest night of the week, it is polite to order at least one drink, non-alcoholic is totally fine.

Please communicate with each other via the event comments or ask at the bar for "The Social Group".

https://www.facebook.com/groups/Uppsala.Social/?fref=ts

Event:312732085.title: Svenskasamtal
Event:312732085.description: Välkommen till svenskasamtal! Vi träffas för att prata svenska i en trevlig atmosfär. Gruppen är öppen för alla, men man bör kunna lite svenska (och till exempel kunna förstå vad som står här). Som vanligt, inget politiskt prat, bara vanlig konversation. Om du har material från språkstudier som du vill öva på kan du ta med det.

Event:313634157.title: Vibe coding with Alva & lovable (for free!)
Event:313634157.description:
SWE🇸🇪 (English further down)

På söndag kickar Alva igång Sveriges första 🎶Reggaeton Hackathon🎶

Nu på söndag den 8e mars kl 11-14 ses vi och vibecodar med hjälp av Lovable med skön Reggaeton i bakgrunden. Ta bara med en laptop så är du all set!💻 NOLL erfarenhet behövs!

🕚 8e mars, kl 11-14
📍Arena Magasin X, Sidenvävargatan 17, Uppsala

Kom och koda, snacka eller bara vibea!🤖

Hoppas vi ses👋🏻

ENG🇬🇧
This Sunday I am starting Sweden's first 🎶Reggaeton hackaton🎶

This Sunday, March 8th, 11-14 o'clock we meet up and vibecode using Lovable (for free this day) while listening to some nice Reggaeton in the background. Just bring a laptop and you're all set💻 ZERO previous experience needed!

🕚March 8th, 11-14 o'clock
📍Arena Magasin X, Sidenvävargatan 17, Uppsala

Come and code, chat or just vibe!🤖

Hope I'll see you there!👋🏻

Event:313381764.title: English Conversation
Event:313381764.description:
Come and practice your English! Or just have some coffee at a nice café. We will be at Fågelsången, at Munkgatan 3 near the city park. As usual no politics, only nice conversation.

This is at the same time and place as the bi-weekly café meeting in the Social Group, they are the same meetup.

series.description: Every 2nd Sunday of the month until December 13, 2026

Group:37907233.name: Diary writing and accelerating your personal growth

Event:313510613.title: Diary writing  (English language) - 1 year anniversary!
Event:313510613.description:
**Session description**
Those who participate can co-produce the process. Please bring your diary or notebook and a pen. You can drop in at your own comfort in first 30 minutes. This session repeats every other week, on odd weeks, excluding vacation periods.

**A proposed work process is**:

1. get yourself a drink, sit down
2. we can briefly chat to get to know each other (when there are a lot of new people, we spend more time on this, otherwise often less)
3. we spend a bit of time writing
4. we share a bit about how we enjoy our diary writing process and how it helps you move forward in life. This can be done in small group or one-on-one setting, based on with how many we are and based on logistics (will we sit at a bigger table or spread over smaller).
5. we can also discuss other locations for this meetup, where we have more control over our surroundings to facilitate learning.

When interacting with others, I appreciate when you mind psychological safety of the other participants. If you are unsure about your ability to do so, taking a listening role is a safe bet! This safety is of importance to facilitate sharing and learning.

This session will be in Kaffe rum Storken, so you are expected to buy a drink, before you sit down and relax.

Event:313448981.title: Socratic Cafe @ Kafferummet Storken
Event:313448981.description:
**We're hosting a Socratic cafe at Kafferummet Storken by Stora Torget!** We wanted to create an open-minded space in Uppsala where you can meet regularly to discuss life philosophy. As a thank you to Kafferummet Storken for letting us use their lovely place, please order something before you arrive.

**Bring a question, vote on your favorite question, and share your personal experiences.**

**What you can expect:**

* Discuss an open-ended question that prompt you to reflect and go deeper.
* Personal conversations that relate to your life, relationships, or topics we can all relate to as human beings.
* Gain insights into your personal life, emotions, values, and bigger questions in life.
* Moderated conversations which encourage reflection and where everyone is able to share.
* To have fun - after all, life is a silly place, despite all the seriousness, there's a lot of absurdity too!

**What you won't find here:**

* People jumping at or interrupting what you have to say mid-sentence. We raise our hands to volunteer our thoughts, and the moderator tries to distribute the word fairly.
* Debates where people try to win an argument or "find the right answer".
* Topics that require you to be a scientist or expert. This is a space to explore our own and others personal experiences and thoughts around a topic, and to think together.

**Our vision of Socrates**

We encourage this to be a place of active listening and a stream of consciousness. We see this as a place to test out new thoughts and to learn new ideas, letting go of past preconceptions and prejudice, we allow ourselves to stop and really think about what is said, to ask questions. Here, we actively think about our own feelings about a topic, our personal experiences, and why we think the way that we do.
We don't try to label each others or attack other people. We try to make sure we have a fair understanding of what other people say. Our focus is not to change anyone's mind but to learn different ways to see things. We're 8 billion people on this planet - that's 16 billion eyes allowing us to see the world from a myriad of viewpoints. We don't need to label or describe an experience the same way, and we don't need to agree. The most important part is the connection that comes from understanding each other a little bit better.

**Who was Socrates and what does he do at our Cafe?**

Socrates was an Ancient Greek philosopher who loved the pursuit of wisdom (philo-sophia), and did anything he could to reach new insights. Socrates was a fierce critic of *Sophists* or *Wisdom teachers* \-\- and saw them as people more concerned with sounding right\, than being right\. It's tempting\, still today\, to try to act or sound confident or sure\, even when you have doubt\, and a desire to impress people or win can keep us from really reflecting on a topic\.

According to the stories, the ancient oracle of Delphi dubbed him the "wisest man" in the world, because he realized that he didn't know anything. It can be easy to think, when you've studied for a long time, that you're smarter or better than other people, but Socrates lifestyle only taught him intellectual humility. He believed wisdom could be found in anyone, regardless of background or education. So instead of falling victim to arrogance, he fell victim to an insatiable curiosity, and decided to devote his life to life-long learning. What an ideal!
Sadly, he was sentenced to death -- accused of teaching young people independent thinking, an important skill in any society. So let's all channel the spirit of Socrates and see what we can learn from each other!

**Practicals**

**Who we are**

We're an independent study circle collaborating with ABF Uppsala, which allows us free access to their spaces.
We don't yet have an organization, no manifesto, we're just normal people, but we hope we can create a nice community together. If you'd like to help or have ideas, send us a message!
We vote for the best question and if multiple questions get the same number of votes, we do a second round to choose the favorite of the evening.,

**Contact information**

Send a message to me on [Meetup.com](http://meetup.com/) with your **phone number** included, to join our **Whatsapp** Group! Unfortunately, due to spam, I can't put out a public link.

**How to find us**

The cafe is located in the corner next to a greek store. Walk up the stairs, and you'll spot a christmas tree. We're in the small room by the tree.

Event:313080242.title: Padel&Buziness
Event:313080242.description:
**Börja dagen på bästa sättet på padelbanan!**

Vi kommer att spela och träna med coachen Samuel.
Så kom och förbättra ditt slag, lär mer om strategi eller bara kom och häng med likasinnade.
Efter träningen äter vi lite frukost tillsammans ☕️ 🥐 - first smash then mingle 🎉

📆 Datum: fredagen den 13e mars
⏱ Tid: 7-9
🎾 7-8 Padel
☕️ 8.15-9 Frukost
📍 Plats: UTK

Vi har bokat 2 banor så det finns plats för 8 pers, först till kvarn :)
Och kom i tid så vi kan börja spela kl7 🎾

Vi ses!
46elks
